channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.24 (Build 20260713.1)
item.description:
What's New

fix: allow uppercase Đ abbreviations at any position (HĐ, PGĐ, HĐQT)

The d-stroke abbreviation whitelist only accepted two-letter words with

a leading Đ (ĐN, ĐL), so common all-caps abbreviations with Đ elsewhere

(HĐ, GĐ, PGĐ, BLĐ, LĐBĐ, HĐQT) or longer than two letters (ĐHQG) were

auto-restored to raw input (HDD, GDD, ...) by the wrong-spelling restore

path.

Generalize the whitelist to any all-uppercase word of two or more

letters containing Đ at any position. Vietnamese-first trade-off: caps

English words containing DD (ADD, ODD, HDD) now compose Đ; the raw form

stays reachable with an extra D (HDDD → HDD), consistent with the

existing DDR/DDT behavior.

Includes build number bump to 20260713.1.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
